title: The Man Who Came Back
writer: Jules Eckert Goodman, John Fleming Wilson, Edmund Goulding
actors: George O'Brien, Dorothy Mackaill, Cyril Chadwick
plot: Henry Potter is the irresponsible playboy son of a New York millionaire. Fearing he will disgrace the family name if he stays in New York, the father sends him to San Francisco to work in the family shipyards and, to make a man ou...
